violations.text: Cheese was being held in the open-air case past the date of disposition. Cheese was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Various food items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

The presence of fruit flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to work with pest control to eliminate fly problem. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

The cutting boards in the prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025
The faucet to the 3-bay sink was observed in poor repair. 3-bay sink is missing faucet and has a spray hose attached. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025
The ceiling and ceiling beams in the storefront area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was cleaned at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

Multiple types of cheese were being held in the open-air case past the date of disposition. Per PIC, establishment gets credit from supplier for the expired cheese. Food items were embargoed until supplier gives credit to establishment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

Chicken was observed thawing in the 3-bay sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Chicken was moved to refrigeration at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

Various food items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

The presence of fly's is not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control to eliminate fly problem. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

The cutting boards in the prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The faucet to the 3-bay sink was observed in poor repair. 3-bay sink is missing faucet and has a spray hose attached. The dairy 2-door reach-in was observed holding an ambient temperature of 45 DF and in poor repair. Establishment is to service unit. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

Establishment was observed stacking crates, cardboard, and debris outside of establishment. Establishment is to obtain another dumpster or having trash removed more frequently. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025
The ceiling and ceiling beams in the storefront area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025

Display case (meat) is lacking a consumer advisory. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. PIC informed, guidance provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
The ledge located in the meat area was not in good repair, observed gap in FRP with exposed wood. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
Meat display case was in poor repair, observed crack in glass. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

The fans in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
